task_completion.description: Verify the USLCI database has been imported into openLCA.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The openLCA Navigation panel displays the imported database (e.g., 'uslci_database') in the database list.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent located the specific electricity flows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The openLCA interface shows 'Electricity, at grid, Eastern US' and 'Electricity, at grid, Western US' in the Flows folder, search results, or a bulk replace dialog.

task_completion.description: Verify the Eastern US electricity flow was replaced with the Western US electricity flow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A bulk replace operation dialog showing the swap from Eastern to Western US electricity, OR process input/output tabs showing 'Electricity, at grid, Western US' where Eastern US would typically be.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Electricity, at grid, Eastern US' flow is no longer used or has been deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Electricity, at grid, Eastern US' flow is either completely missing from the openLCA Flows navigation tree (deleted), or its 'Usage' tab is open and shows an empty list (0 processes using it).

task_completion.description: Verify the completion of actions is documented in the specified log file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displays a file named 'refactor_log.txt' located in '~/LCA_Results/' (or '/home/ga/LCA_Results/') containing text that documents the database relocation/replacement actions.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the openLCA graphical user interface for the database operations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the openLCA application open and being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands running SQL or Python scripts to modify the database backend.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually replaced the flow inputs rather than just renaming the old flow.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent used the replace tool or modified process inputs, rather than simply right-clicking 'Electricity, at grid, Eastern US' and renaming it to 'Western US' (which would result in duplicate names or missing the actual Western flow).

integrity.description: Verify the log file is created in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path visible in the text editor or terminal explicitly shows '/home/ga/LCA_Results/refactor_log.txt' or '~/LCA_Results/refactor_log.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The USLCI database is imported from /home/ga/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip. The log file must be saved to /home/ga/LCA_Results/refactor_log.txt. Note that while 'Electricity, at grid, Eastern US' and 'Electricity, at grid, Western US' are the target flows for this task, they are simulated names for this scenario representing the Eastern and Western Interconnections of the US power grid.
